steps.label: Participant Demographic and Intake Information
steps.description: On this screen, you will enter demographic and domain-specific details for each individual participating in the intake process. Please provide accurate information for each field. This information is used to identify and link participants to the intake record. You will be guided to search for existing records in the Master Client Index (MCI) after entering the details. Fields marked with an asterisk (*) are required. Review the instructions and ensure all data is correct before proceeding.

fields.label: Middle Name
fields.error_message: Middle Name must be valid text.

fields.label: Relationship to Primary Client
fields.error_message: Relationship to Primary Client is required.

data_validation: Birth date cannot be in the future.
Phone number must be valid format.
Cannot have more than one mother.
Relationship to Primary Client must be unique per participant.

buttons.label: Search MCI
buttons.description: Initiate a search in the Master Client Index using the entered participant information.

steps.label: Participant Marital Details
steps.description: On this screen, you will capture the marital status and related details of the participant. Please select the appropriate marital status and provide additional information if applicable. If the participant is married, you will be prompted to enter spouse information. This helps ensure accurate family and relationship mapping for the intake process. Review all entries before proceeding.

fields.label: Spouse Name
fields.error_message: Spouse Name must be valid text.

fields.label: Number of Children
fields.error_message: Number of Children must be a valid number.

data_validation: If Marital Status is 'Married', Spouse Name is required.
Number of Children must be zero or greater.
If Marital Status is 'Divorced', 'Widowed', or 'Separated', Spouse Name should not be entered.
Spouse Name must not match participant's own name.

buttons.label: Continue
buttons.description: Proceed to the next step after entering marital details.
actions: Navigate to MCI Search Results & Selection

steps.label: Search Master Client Index (MCI)
steps.description: When the Intake Specialist clicks the 'Search MCI' button, the system must search the Master Client Index using the entered Name (First Name, Middle Name, Last Name), Date of Birth, and Social Security Number (if available). If matching records are found, display them to the Intake Specialist. If no match is found, provide the option to create a new client record.

rules.label: Trigger MCI Search
rules.logic: Upon clicking the 'Search MCI' button, initiate a search in the Master Client Index using the provided First Name, Middle Name (if entered), Last Name, and Date of Birth. If Social Security Number is available in the system, include it in the search criteria.

rules.label: Display Search Results
rules.logic: If one or more matching records are found in the MCI, display the results to the Intake Specialist for review and selection.

rules.label: No Match Handling
rules.logic: If no matching records are found, present the option to create a new client record.

steps.label: MCI Search Results and Client Selection
steps.description: This screen displays the results of your search in the Master Client Index (MCI) based on the participant information you entered. Review the list of matching individuals and select the correct record if found. If no match is found, you may create a new client record. Carefully verify the details before making a selection to ensure accurate linkage to the intake record.

fields.label: Select Existing Individual
fields.error_message: Please select an individual or choose to create a new record.

fields.label: Create New Client Record
fields.error_message: Unable to create new client record.

data_validation: SSN must be unique for new client records.
Cannot link multiple intake records to the same individual unless permitted.
If no existing individual is selected, new client record creation is required.
Selected individual must match entered demographic details.

buttons.label: Select Existing Individual
buttons.description: Link the selected individual to the intake record and proceed.

buttons.label: Create New Client Record
buttons.description: Initiate creation of a new client record in the MCI.

steps.label: Select Existing Individual
steps.description: When the Intake Specialist selects an existing individual from the MCI search results, the system must link the selected individual to the current intake record. The Intake Specialist can then proceed to add another participant or finalize the intake process as required.

rules.label: Link Individual to Intake
rules.logic: Upon selection of an existing individual from the MCI search results, associate the individual's MCI record with the current intake record.

rules.label: Proceed to Next Step
rules.logic: After linking, allow the Intake Specialist to either add another participant or finalize the intake, based on workflow requirements.

steps.label: Create New Client Record
steps.description: If no matching individual is found in the MCI, the Intake Specialist can create a new client record. The system must require entry of Name (First Name, Middle Name, Last Name), Date of Birth, Gender, and Address. Once the new record is created, it must be linked to the current intake record.

rules.label: Required Fields for New Client
rules.logic: To create a new client record, require entry of First Name, Last Name, Date of Birth, Gender, and Address. Middle Name is optional.

rules.label: Create and Link Record
rules.logic: Upon submission, create the new client record in the MCI and link it to the current intake record.
